response.justification: Bogdan's extensive experience as a full-stack engineer, demonstrated across multiple roles and projects, aligns closely with the role's requirements. His recent work in AI-agent infrastructure and TypeScript/Node.js stacks shows relevance, and his ability to work with diverse technologies (e.g., Kotlin/Java for backend services) matches the secondary stack needs. His open-source contributions and workshops further highlight his depth and passion for software development.
strengths: 10+ years of full-stack development experience with TypeScript and Node.js
Proven track record in scaling systems and optimizing performance (e.g., Direct Mail automation platform, low-latency microservices)
Strong background in cloud platforms, Docker, and CI/CD, with experience in AI agent development and modern testing frameworks
concerns: Limited explicit experience with Nest.js and Vitest (though familiar with Node.js and testing frameworks)
Most recent role (re:cinq) is very recent (April 2025), so current stability is unclear
GitLab and Ember.js experience is dated and not aligned with React/Vitest requirements

key_factors.factor: Full-stack experience with core stack (TypeScript, Node.js)
